content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(1, 3, 0), (3, 5, 0), (5, 9, 4), (0, 6, 5), (1, 6, 7), (0, 2, 8), (7, 8, 9), (5, 7, 10), (1, 7, 11), (0, 4, 12), (2, 8, 13), (1, 8, 15), (5, 8, 15), (2, 5, 17)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 7 exactly at time 11.

We scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node:

* Edge (1, 3, 0) has node 1 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (3, 5, 0) has node 3 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (5, 9, 4) has node 5 and time 4. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 6, 5) has node 0 and time 5. -> Ignore.
* Edge (1, 6, 7) has node 1 and time 7. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (0, 2, 8) has node 0 and time 8. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (7, 8, 9) has node 7 and time 9. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (5, 7, 10) has node 5 and time 10. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (1, 7, 11) has node 1 and time 11. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 4, 12) has node 0 and time 12. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (2, 8, 13) has node 2 and time 13. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 8, 15) has node 1 and time 15. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (5, 8, 15) has node 5 and time 15. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (2, 5, 17) has node 2 and time 17. -> Add node 5.

The nodes matched are 6, 2, 8, and 7.

Answer: [6, 2, 8, 7]
